CREATE TABLE hex_area_test (resolution UInt8, area Float64);

INSERT INTO hex_area_test VALUES (0, h3HexAreaKm2(0)), (1, h3HexAreaKm2(1)), (2, h3HexAreaKm2(2)), (3, h3HexAreaKm2(3)), (4, h3HexAreaKm2(4)), (5, h3HexAreaKm2(5)), (6, h3HexAreaKm2(6)), (7, h3HexAreaKm2(7)), (8, h3HexAreaKm2(8)), (9, h3HexAreaKm2(9)), (10, h3HexAreaKm2(10)), (11, h3HexAreaKm2(11)), (12, h3HexAreaKm2(12)), (13, h3HexAreaKm2(13)), (14, h3HexAreaKm2(14)), (15, h3HexAreaKm2(15));
SELECT resolution, area FROM hex_area_test WHERE resolution BETWEEN 0 AND 15 ORDER BY resolution;
SELECT h3HexAreaKm2(resolution) AS area, resolution FROM (SELECT number AS resolution FROM numbers(16)) JOIN hex_area_test ON resolution = hex_area_test.resolution;
SELECT h3HexAreaKm2(10) AS area, (SELECT AVG(area) FROM hex_area_test) AS avg_area FROM hex_area_test;
WITH (SELECT AVG(area) FROM hex_area_test) AS avg_area_value SELECT h3HexAreaKm2(8) AS area, avg_area_value;
SELECT count(*) FROM hex_area_test WHERE area > 0;
CREATE TABLE example_multi_join (id UInt8, resolution UInt8);
SELECT e.id, h.area FROM example_multi_join AS e JOIN hex_area_test AS h ON e.resolution = h.resolution WHERE e.id < 3;
SELECT h3HexAreaKm2(resolution) * 1.5 AS adjusted_area FROM (SELECT resolution FROM hex_area_test WHERE area < 500) AS subquery;
